Work Sans, Inter, 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif

svg.text: 矿物定向排列消除漫反射

text.font-family: Work Sans, Inter, 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif

svg.text: • 不依赖碳沉积或铁物相改变

text.font-family: Work Sans, Inter, 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif

svg.text: • 精细磨光使层状硅酸盐矿物定向排列

text.font-family: Work Sans, Inter, 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif

svg.text: • 消除可见光漫反射，呈现深色光泽外观

text.font-family: Work Sans, Inter, 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif

svg.text: • Kim等：百济黑陶呈色完全归因于矿物排列
